content.text: based on what you've shared with hale, mira made the move from purees to finger foods at 9 months old — that's the fact on file from when you told us about her feeding transition. now at 18 months she's well into the finger foods stage, so that's a solid 9 months of independent eating under her belt. if you ever want to update that detail or add more context around it, just let me know and i'll keep the record current.
